# ClawDrop — clawdrop.org

> Weekly newsletter and guide site about OpenClaw use cases, tutorials, and playbooks for business owners and operators.

## Guides

- [How Much Does OpenClaw Cost?](https://clawdrop.org/learn/openclaw-cost-breakdown/): Real pricing breakdown for 2026. Free vs paid tiers, model costs, hosting options.
- [Best OpenClaw Skills to Install](https://clawdrop.org/learn/best-openclaw-skills/): Curated skill recommendations organized by use case. What to install, what to skip.
- [OpenClaw Browser Automation](https://clawdrop.org/learn/openclaw-browser-automation/): Complete guide to browser relay, multi-profile setup, web scraping, and remote browser control.

## Playbooks

Step-by-step guides showing real OpenClaw builds you can replicate: https://clawdrop.org/playbooks/

## Newsletter

ClawDrop delivers 5 real OpenClaw builds every Tuesday. Subscribe at https://clawdrop.org/

## About

ClawDrop is run by people who use OpenClaw every day. Content is based on real community builds, not marketing copy.
